name: TK 2018 | Ian Sams, Communications Director
subject: Add your name today: No rushed vote on Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | In light of the recent sexual assault allegations made against him, it's more important than ever that we prevent a rushed vote on Judge Kavanaugh. [Add your name if you agree.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b1/3e0906/7023e1b6/3e36691d/1949558809/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree&utm_campaign=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS")

* * *

Last [Sunday,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b1/3e0906/7023e1b6/3e36691c/1949558809/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sunday&utm_campaign=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS") Dr. Christine Blasey Ford went public with previously anonymous charges against Judge Brett Kavanaugh - that he sexually assaulted her in the early 1980s when they were high school students. Her letter details very serious charges, and even provides corroboration including therapist notes and polygraph results.

Regardless of how they felt about Judge Kavanaugh before these allegations came to light, it is now imperative that Senate Republicans take a step back and address this. **_There is no legitimate reason to jam through a vote and rush through an incomplete investigative process._**

The Judiciary Committee and the Senate have an obligation to take these charges seriously. Dr. Ford submitted a letter to Senators, which is now in Judge Kavanaugh's FBI background file. She went on the record with documentation. She has asked for the FBI to reopen its investigation into Kavanaugh to review this matter prior to a Senate hearing - and there is much indication by Republicans at this point that she will be denied that. At the very least, Senate Republicans must allow the time and space necessary to fully examine the charges at hand before voting to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the highest court in the land.

[Add your name if you agree that the Senate must NOT jam through a rushed vote on Judge Kavanaugh.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b1/3e0906/7023e1b6/3e366913/1949558809/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+that+the+Sena&utm_campaign=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS")

Thank you.

_-Ian_

Ian Sams
Communications Director
Kaine for Virginia | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b1/3e0906/7023e1b6/3e366912/1949558809/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180922_3_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition-RS")

subject: Where I’ve been
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:

#
Peter -- **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation of $10 or more to my campaign to change Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2294450/12368768/-655895844?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBiODRmNy00NmJmLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BV6Mr3U3PUzbaU8c7jgJbp3HKkcQIpD2gBhMq1njgrM=&refcode=em180923-lunches-link&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10) **But first, I want to talk with you a bit about where I’ve been these past few months. From the beginning, my campaign has avoided the typical Washington playbook. Instead, this summer I’ve been hosting roundtable conversations on main streets and brown-bag lunches in barns, hospitals, and community centers -- talking with Tennesseans about the problems they face. I know the best way to learn is to just talk with folks on the front lines. I have no idea the political views of the people at these events -- and I don’t care. I just want to hear directly about their experiences and talk about the best ideas. **In these conversations, we’ve been able to come up with bold solutions to some of the big problems facing our communities -- like empowering the Tennessee Valley Authority to provide broadband internet to rural communities and restoring the DEA's authority to stop large shipments of opioids from devastating our communities.** I’ve been humbled by how our message of bringing people together to get things done is resonating with voters. But here’s the truth -- the Washington establishment would rather make this race about scoring partisan points versus finding real solutions. That’s why dark money groups have committed to spending more than $8 MILLION to beat me this November. And it’s why I’m asking for your help. **Can you chip in $10 or more so our campaign can keep tuning out the partisan noise and win on Election Day? Your support will be key to keeping this race focused on the issues that matter.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2294451/12368769/1568969530?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBiODRmNy00NmJmLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BV6Mr3U3PUzbaU8c7jgJbp3HKkcQIpD2gBhMq1njgrM=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180923-lunches-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

clean_body: | Peter -- But first, I want to talk with you a bit about where I’ve been these past few months. From the beginning, my campaign has avoided the typical Washington playbook. Instead, this summer I’ve been hosting roundtable conversations on main streets and brown-bag lunches in barns, hospitals, and community centers -- talking with Tennesseans about the problems they face. I know the best way to learn is to just talk with folks on the front lines. I have no idea the political views of the people at these events -- and I don’t care. I just want to hear directly about their experiences and talk about the best ideas. In these conversations, we’ve been able to come up with bold solutions to some of the big problems facing our communities -- like empowering the Tennessee Valley Authority to provide broadband internet to rural communities and restoring the DEA's authority to stop large shipments of opioids from devastating our communities. I’ve been humbled by how our message of bringing people together to get things done is resonating with voters. But here’s the truth -- the Washington establishment would rather make this race about scoring partisan points versus finding real solutions. That’s why dark money groups have committed to spending more than $8 MILLION to beat me this November. And it’s why I’m asking for your help. Can you chip in $10 or more so our campaign can keep tuning out the partisan noise and win on Election Day? Your support will be key to keeping this race focused on the issues that matter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m glad we can count on your help, \-- Phil Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

I've read a lot about Democrats' chances of winning the Senate majority, maybe you have, too. _CNN_ published an article last week, _FiveThirtyEight_ came out with their most up-to-date forecasts and _Bloomberg_ published a piece on Monday. Every possible path they outline rests on the same assumption: that I'll win re-election here in Pennsylvania.

**_[Bottom line: if Democrats are going to take back the Senate so we can put a stop to the President's dangerous and divisive agenda, we need to do everything we can to protect this Senate seat. Will you make a $5 donation to my campaign to help out today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180923_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

What we do here will have an effect on the rest of the country. Earlier this week, one of President Trump's economic advisors promised that, after the midterms, they're going to look into cuts to programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. I'm furious -- that is outrageous. The President and his allies exploded the deficit when they passed their corporate tax cut, and now they're eyeing programs that middle-class families depend on to make up the difference. I will not stand for it. Workers invest in these programs throughout their lives: Washington can't break its promise by cashing in those investments to help the richest Americans.

**If we want to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, we need Democrats to take back the Senate, and that starts right here in Pennsylvania. I promise to use your donation to keep this campaign in fighting shape through Election Day, so that when the time comes, I can keep voting to protect the middle class.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180923_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

subject: Lead our state forward
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Friends,

Since day one, we've been running a true grassroots, people-powered campaign -- and whether it's knocking on doors, making phone calls, helping get Floridians registered to vote, or just chipping in a few dollars when you can, our progress is thanks to folks like you.

But now, we need your help to cross the finish line -- can we count on you?

**[Chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, and make sure our field team has the resources they need to spread Mayor Andrew Gillum's bold, progressive plans to every corner of the state.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e4/9e00690/5dbd54f8/2401146a/3103687696/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-seven-weeks-fr?gpsid=13_55_3675&refcode=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettxx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+afford+and")**

Every dollar helps us get one step closer to electing a Governor in November who will help lead our state forward.

Friends,

49 days.

That's all that stands between us and electing a Governor who will fight for everyday working people.

Mayor Andrew Gillum's bold, progressive plans for an inclusive economy with better jobs and higher wages, a strong public education system, and affordable healthcare as a right for every Floridian will move our state forward -- but we have to make sure every voter in the state knows it.

**[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help our field team get the resources we need to keep spreading Mayor Gillum's plan to every corner of the state?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e4/9e00690/5dbd54f8/2401146e/3103687696/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-seven-weeks-fr?gpsid=13_55_3675&refcode=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+a")**

With only seven weeks until Election Day, our team is fired up -- and we're ready to take that energy and turn it into action. We're already talking to voters at their doors, on the phones, and at events all across the state -- that's how we won the primary, and that's how we'll win again on Tuesday, November 6.

But it's going to take all of us doing our part to keep our grassroots momentum growing.

**[So please, chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help Mayor Gillum bring it home.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e4/9e00690/5dbd54f8/24011461/3103687696/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-seven-weeks-fr?gpsid=13_55_3675&refcode=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_7weks1_Kicker_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=6+-+So+please+chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+")**

Thank you,

David Metellus
Deputy Organizing Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

body:
|

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, and I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180923_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180923_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180923_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grids and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate earlier this month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**And I 'm standing up to President Trump's cynical attempt to force consumers to bailout uncompetitive coal and nuclear power plants. **In a blatant effort to keep his campaign promises, the president is claiming a national security emergency to keep coal-fired plants open. But the truth is there is no national security emergency, and this artificial bailout will increase energy costs and leave businesses and households paying higher electric bills. I am going to keep fighting against this bailout and any attempt to drag us back on energy, and I will continue to push for modernizing and diversifying our energy grid.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "" Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos. I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers. Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grids and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate earlier this month. I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico. The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line. And I 'm standing up to President Trump's cynical attempt to force consumers to bailout uncompetitive coal and nuclear power plants. In a blatant effort to keep his campaign promises, the president is claiming a national security emergency to keep coal-fired plants open. But the truth is there is no national security emergency, and this artificial bailout will increase energy costs and leave businesses and households paying higher electric bills. I am going to keep fighting against this bailout and any attempt to drag us back on energy, and I will continue to push for modernizing and diversifying our energy grid. Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country. Friend,

Earlier this month, I joined Steve Sisolak for a roundtable discussion about criminal justice reform and I saw firsthand the type of leader Steve will be for Nevada.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Z1fF3-D522GjkDq3lc7hLth8UJlapJJ8nMqUhIRnlY=/s2Yi4TQjg7_J4pejYqY5s836WhOmpkR6rguFYZV1Y9M=?gpsid=37_57_3738&refcode=em18_180922_EH4SS_SS_fnd_gq_act__EH_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180922_EH4SS_SS_fnd_gq_act__EH_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)

Steve's committed to making sure every family can thrive no matter their zip code, background, or income. Whether it's promoting equality in our justice system, improving Nevada's public schools, expanding access to affordable health care, or protecting DREAMers, he is standing by Nevadans every step of the way.

Steve won't just be a good governor -- he'll be a **great** governor. That's why I'm proud to endorse his campaign.

**[But time is running out to help, so I hope you'll join me in stepping up right now. Please contribute whatever you can today to Steve's campaign. $5, $20, or more -- it will make all the difference this November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Z1fF3-D522GjkDq3lc7hLth8UJlapJJ8nMqUhIRnlY=/s2Yi4TQjg7_J4pejYqY5s836WhOmpkR6rguFYZV1Y9M=?gpsid=37_57_3738&refcode=em18_180922_EH4SS_L1_fnd_gq_act__EH_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180922_EH4SS_L1_fnd_gq_act__EH_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: I want you to imagine this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Just think: In 6.5 weeks, we could be celebrating the election of Beto
O’Rourke. It would be a historic victory for Texas and the country -- and
a major step toward a future where all of us can succeed.

Being part of our massive grassroots effort to unseat Ted Cruz and elect
Beto just got a little easier -- and a lot more urgent.

If you can come back to Texas during the final, month-long sprint to help
elect Beto, we will help with logistics and training -- and we might be
able to help if finances are a barrier. We know it’s lot to ask, but it
could make a huge impact.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20180923&t=1001&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB ]That’s why we’re asking you to come to Texas, even though you’re in
another state. Just fill out this form, and an organizer will contact
you as soon as possible to sort out the details.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20180923&t=1002&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB ]Come back to Texas

Thousands of people have already signed up to come back to Texas, even
from far away -- from Anchorage, Alaska to Honolulu, Hawaii;
Jacksonville, Florida to Wichita, Kansas. It’s pretty amazing, and it
gives me real confidence that we can win if enough people take the leap.

If coming to Texas is 100% not possible for you (which we understand!),
you can still help by gathering folks in your community to make calls for
Beto. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20180923&t=1003&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB ]Just sign up to host a phone bank, and we’ll get you all the info
and support you need.

We’ve gotten this far because we’re running this campaign the right way --
powered by people, not PACs. But everything comes down to these final
weeks.

This is history in the making. I hope you won’t miss out on being part of
it.

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

P.S. Our final, month-long sprint is the largest ‘get out the vote’ effort
that’s ever been organized in the state of Texas, and we need more
resources to pull it off. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=em20180923&t=1004&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB ]If you can pitch in, please do that here.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=em20180923&t=1005&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180923footer&t=1006&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=12350%2E444211%2EaacFlB

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | I've been spending my September either out in Virginia meeting with folks or in the Senate fighting what I believe could turn out to be some of the most defining battles of our time. **Supreme Court confirmations are our constitutional duty and should not be taken lightly or rushed.**

As of today, we have one week left of September, one week left to hit our goal, and one week until the books close on our third quarter numbers. After that, the numbers go public, and we are sprinting to the end to win in November and elect our Democratic congressional candidates here in Virginia.

To get there, we set ambitious fundraising goals. Here's where we stand: We have exactly one week to raise $100,000.

**So I 'm asking for a little help from you to make sure we hit this goal. Can you chip in for the month of September? Sure would mean a lot to me. [If you can donate today, click here and let me know.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11bc/3e0906/7033851d/3e366a2b/365677293/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+If+you+can+donate+today+click+here+and+l&utm_campaign=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week&source=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week")**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11bc/3e0906/7033851d/3e366a2a/365677293/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week&source=20180923_1_FR_TK_one-week")

clean_body: | | I've been spending my September either out in Virginia meeting with folks or in the Senate fighting what I believe could turn out to be some of the most defining battles of our time. Supreme Court confirmations are our constitutional duty and should not be taken lightly or rushed. As of today, we have one week left of September, one week left to hit our goal, and one week until the books close on our third quarter numbers. After that, the numbers go public, and we are sprinting to the end to win in November and elect our Democratic congressional candidates here in Virginia. To get there, we set ambitious fundraising goals. Here's where we stand: We have exactly one week to raise $100,000. So I 'm asking for a little help from you to make sure we hit this goal. Can you chip in for the month of September? Sure would mean a lot to me. "" Derek, if you can help out in the next week -- whether it's for the first time all year, the first time this week, or maybe it's even the fifth time! -- I would sure appreciate it. Click the link below to contribute to my re-election to the Senate and to support the whole Virginia Democratic ticket: "" Talk soon, Tim | "" * | "" "" ""

name: Jessica Morse
subject: I just wrapped up my first debate with Tom McClintock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ElkEj-P8B1FdvkUbNEtbNckM2zPtt5D1Q_cz00_IDbE=/wwkOWi4zM_z0V-7Tm1dVFAzmfr4LWdRY9jWhXoOC9XQ=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180923_JM_20180923-postdebate_all_logo)
Peter, today was my first debate with Congressman McClintock. I was honored that so many people throughout the district came to listen and offer support.
Our community is demanding a representative who will take the time to answer thoughtful questions and address our real concerns. **But at today 's debate, Tom McClintock completely failed to do that.**
McClintock couldn't defend his vote to eliminate coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, his vote against funding forest fire prevention, or his vote for the tax bill that will increase our deficit by $1.8 billion and necessitate brutal cuts to Medicare and Social Security.
**Congressman McClintock clearly does not represent us.** With these votes, he assuaged the concerns of the Koch Brothers and his other corporate donors, but ignored the real needs of our students, our seniors, and our community.
Our community is done with old school, divisive politics. We are hungry for someone who listens, works towards solutions and will fight for us.
**We have just over six weeks to take this across the finish line, and we need all hands on deck. Can you help invest in a new standard for our district with a donation today?**

clean_body: Peter, today was my first debate with Congressman McClintock. I was honored that so many people throughout the district came to listen and offer support. Our community is demanding a representative who will take the time to answer thoughtful questions and address our real concerns. But at today 's debate, Tom McClintock completely failed to do that. McClintock couldn't defend his vote to eliminate coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, his vote against funding forest fire prevention, or his vote for the tax bill that will increase our deficit by $1.8 billion and necessitate brutal cuts to Medicare and Social Security. Congressman McClintock clearly does not represent us. With these votes, he assuaged the concerns of the Koch Brothers and his other corporate donors, but ignored the real needs of our students, our seniors, and our community. Our community is done with old school, divisive politics. We are hungry for someone who listens, works towards solutions and will fight for us. We have just over six weeks to take this across the finish line, and we need all hands on deck. name: Irene Lin
subject: Violence Against Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
As the campaign manager for J.D. Scholten, I’m really proud to work for a candidate who takes the voices of women seriously and respectfully. Starting with his Grandma Fern to his mom Deb, J.D.’s values have always been influenced and shaped by strong Iowa women. So it’s once again disturbing to see Rep. Steve King doing what he does best: **embarrass Iowa** —this time by insinuating all men have committed sexual assault and should never be held accountable for it. At the Iowa Faith & Freedom Coalition dinner yesterday, he said, with regards to the allegations against Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh:
_“I’m thinking, is there any man in this room that wouldn’t be subjected to such an allegation? A false allegation? How can you disprove something like that? Which means, if that’s the new standard, no man will ever qualify for the Supreme Court again.”_

I think J.D. knows plenty of men, including himself, who can meet this “new standard.” Not sure why Rep. King believes he himself wouldn’t, but that should trouble all of us. Rep. Steve King’s long-standing hostility to taking seriously the pervasive problem of sexual assault is not surprising. He was one of the main obstructionists who tried to stop passage of the 2013 Violence Against Women Act, which passed without his support. This critical legislation has provided funding to help prosecute sexual assault and domestic abuse crimes, as well as assist victims of such crimes. **Iowa women deserve a representative who will fight for their rights and hold men in power accountable for their actions.**
We have just ONE WEEK left till the end of the final fundraising quarter before the election. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Hey the NRA sued me, but I fought and won.
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f9/9e00690/5df9c3b6/240112c7/2383061249/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&source=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx")
Friends,

On Friday, I was honored to be endorsed by Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America, an organization founded by moms in response to the devastating shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School.

If you've been following me for a while, you know that I do more than talk about the epidemic of gun violence. From Sandy Hook, to Las Vegas, to Marjory Stoneman Douglas, to my city of Tallahassee, there is simply too much bloodshed from guns.

And tragically, we know that the gun lobby is standing in the way of keeping our families and fellow citizens safer. I know this because they tried to silence me when I refused to repeal a seemingly innocuous law in Tallahassee that banned guns from our public parks. The gun lobby sued me and the other members of our city council, but fortunately, we won that fight in court.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f9/9e00690/5df9c3b6/240112c6/2383061249/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2")
Across our state and nation, the gun lobby still holds tremendous power -- and my opponent, Ron DeSantis, does whatever the NRA wants. DeSantis even said he would have vetoed the common-sense gun-safety laws that Governor Rick Scott signed into law after Marjory Stoneman Douglas.

DeSantis has made it clear he'll fight for the gun lobby instead of our kids and communities.

Unlike DeSantis, I'll fight for a ban on assault weapons and large capacity magazines. I'll strengthen and require universal background checks for all gun sales. I'll close private sale loopholes, restrict gun access for the mentally ill and known foreign and domestic terrorists, and close the "Boyfriend Loophole."

I've fought the powerful gun lobby in court twice and won -- and as your Governor, I'll fight the NRA and win again.

**[Today, I'm asking you to make a contribution of $3 or more to help elect me on Tuesday, November 6 so we can protect our kids and communities from senseless gun violence.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f9/9e00690/5df9c3b6/240112d9/2383061249/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAMEToday+Im+asking+you+to+make+a+c")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f9/9e00690/5df9c3b6/240112d8/2383061249/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180923_MDA1_fnd_gq_act_nono__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")
